response: In the 2024-25 NBA season, 40-year-old LeBron James continued to dominate as a key player for the Lakers, averaging 28.4 points, 7.2 rebounds, and 8.1 assists per game over 71 appearances. His standout performance earned him an All-Star selection, showcasing his enduring excellence and leadership on the court. Despite his age, James remained one of the league's most impactful players, contributing significantly to the Lakers' success.
